description: Customer reports inconsistent pulse behavior on device LX-200 after 20 minutes of operation with intermittent cooling alarm warnings. No patient harm reported.
Touchscreen UI freezes during the calibration workflow. Procedure aborted. Firmware version 4.2.1.
Coolant leak observed at the rear of the chassis. Smoke alarm in the procedure room briefly activated. Patient was not in the room.
How do I install the new firmware update on the LX-200 platform?
Patient reported a minor burn following the second pass during a treatment. Device alarms did not trigger. Device LX-200 unit DEV-4421.
